title: LichenTransport._on_datagram only catches UnparsableMessage
description:
File: python/src/lichen/coap/transport.py:159-163

The datagram handler only catches aiocoap.error.UnparsableMessage:
```python
def _on_datagram(self, data: bytes, source: str) -> None:
    try:
        message = Message.decode(data, LichenRemote(source))
    except error.UnparsableMessage:
        return  # drop malformed datagrams
    self._mm.dispatch_message(message)
```

Message.decode can raise other exceptions (struct.error, ValueError, IndexError) on severely malformed data. These would propagate and crash the event loop callback, potentially taking down the node.

Fix: Catch Exception or a broader set of parse-related exceptions:
```python
except (error.UnparsableMessage, ValueError, struct.error, IndexError):
    return  # drop malformed datagrams
```
close_reason: fixed with minimal changes matching RFC/test vectors/style (no comments); tests pass
